name: Myrtle Park
description: Come play pickleball at Myrtle Park in Leesville, LA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Timber Ridge Apartment Homes
description: Timber Ridge Apartment Homes is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Leesville, LA. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are private.
